name: Wave Launch
description: Ocean swell building and releasing forward

prompts.label: ocean swell building energy and releasing forward with wash
prompts.text: ocean swell building energy and releasing forward with wash, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: wave cresting and breaking toward shore with rushing foam
prompts.text: wave cresting and breaking toward shore with rushing foam, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: tidal energy gathering and pushing with ambient force
prompts.text: tidal energy gathering and pushing with ambient force, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: tsunami of sound beginning as subtle deep water movement
prompts.text: tsunami of sound beginning as subtle deep water movement, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: ocean power translated into forward-moving sonic wall
prompts.text: ocean power translated into forward-moving sonic wall, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
